title: OverAllPVP Vanilla
description: Minecraft smoother and Vanilla theme for PvP (recommended with CIT Resewn, Continuity or Fabulously Optimized)
body:
Here's my **PvP texture pack** _(Vanilla)_

Change 100% of the game's textures to make them smoother with a vanilla theme for pvp

**You maybe need to UNZIP it and it's recommended with [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) and [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) / [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)**

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/005a8e37d4ecf9bbf715914d16ff5f4e3710085d.jpeg)
